glosses.vi: thống chế; thợ đóng móng ngựa

sentences.target: Je passe devant la statue du maréchal.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pas dəvɑ̃ la staty dy maʁeʃal/

translations.fr: Je passe devant la statue du maréchal.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pas dəvɑ̃ la staty dy maʁeʃal/
translations.en: I walk past the marshal's statue.
translations.es: Paso frente a la estatua del mariscal.
translations.de: Ich gehe an der Statue des Marschalls vorbei.
translations.it: Passo davanti alla statua del maresciallo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从元帅的雕像旁走过。
translations.he: אני חולף על פני פסל המרשל.
translations.vi: Tôi đi ngang bức tượng của thống chế.
translations.nl: Ik loop langs het standbeeld van de maarschalk.
translations.hi: मैं मार्शल की प्रतिमा के पास से गुजरता हूँ.
translations.el: Περνάω μπροστά από το άγαλμα του στρατάρχη.
translations.ja: 私は元帥の像の前を通り過ぎます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun; subject of the verb 'passe'.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; intransitive here with a locative complement introduced by 'devant'.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement ('la statue du maréchal').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'statue'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP governed by 'devant'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le'; introduces a complement ('maréchal') specifying association/possession with 'statue'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: On visite le musée du maréchal.

translations.fr: On visite le musée du maréchal.
translations.de: Wir besuchen das Museum des Marschalls.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们参观元帅的博物馆。
translations.yue: 我哋去參觀元帥嘅博物館。
translations.pt: Estamos visitando o museu do marechal.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tham quan bảo tàng của thống chế.
translations.nl: We bezoeken het museum van de maarschalk.
translations.hi: हम मार्शल के संग्रहालय का दौरा कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは元帥の博物館を見学しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun, grammatically 3rd person singular; subject of 'visite'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting the direct object 'le musée du maréchal'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'musée'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'visite'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le'; introduces a post-nominal complement specifying the museum's association ('du maréchal').
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'du'.

sentences.target: Tu connais l'avenue du maréchal Foch.

translations.fr: Tu connais l'avenue du maréchal Foch.
translations.es: Conoces la Avenida del Mariscal Foch.
translations.pt: Você conhece a Avenida Marechal Foch.
translations.he: אתה מכיר את שדרות המרשל פוש.
translations.vi: Bạn biết Đại lộ Thống chế Foch.
translations.hi: तुम मार्शल फोश एवेन्यू को जानते हो.
translations.sv: Du känner till Marskalk Fochs aveny.
translations.ja: あなたはフォッシュ元帥通りを知っている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'connais'.
Finite verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; transitive, taking 'l'avenue du maréchal Foch' as direct object.
Fused form with elided definite article ('l'' + 'avenue'); head noun 'avenue' (feminine singular) with a definite determiner; functions as the direct object.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le' introducing a naming/genitive complement ('maréchal Foch') of 'avenue'.
Common noun, masculine singular used as a title before a proper name; complement of 'du'.
Proper noun (surname); completes the titled name 'maréchal Foch' within the complement of 'du'.

sentences.target: Nous parlons d'un célèbre maréchal aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Nous parlons d'un célèbre maréchal aujourd'hui.
translations.en: We're talking about a famous marshal today.
translations.es: Hoy hablamos de un mariscal famoso.
translations.de: Heute sprechen wir über einen berühmten Marschall.
translations.it: Oggi parliamo di un maresciallo famoso.
translations.ko: 오늘 우리는 유명한 원수에 대해 이야기해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天谈论一位著名的元帅。
translations.yue: 我哋今日講一位著名嘅元帥。
translations.ru: Сегодня мы говорим о знаменитом маршале.
translations.pt: Hoje estamos falando sobre um marechal famoso.
translations.he: היום אנחנו מדברים על מרשל מפורסם.
translations.tr: Bugün ünlü bir mareşal hakkında konuşuyoruz.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đang nói về một vị thống chế nổi tiếng.
translations.nl: Vandaag praten we over een beroemde maarschalk.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми говоримо про відомого маршала.
translations.hi: आज हम एक प्रसिद्ध मार्शल के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα μιλάμε για έναν διάσημο στρατάρχη.
translations.nb: I dag snakker vi om en berømt marskalk.
translations.id: Hari ini kami membicarakan seorang marsekal terkenal.
translations.sv: Idag pratar vi om en berömd marskalk.
translations.ro: Astăzi vorbim despre un mareșal celebru.
translations.da: I dag taler vi om en berømt marskal.
translations.ja: 今日は有名な元帥について話しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; subject of 'parlons'.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person plural; intransitive with a prepositional complement selected by 'de' ('parler de' = talk about).
Contraction with elision ('de' + 'un'); introduces the NP 'célèbre maréchal' as the topic/object of discussion.
Attributive adjective; here masculine singular agreeing with 'maréchal' (form is identical in masc./fem. in the singular).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de' (via 'd'') and modified by 'célèbre'.
Temporal adverb modifying the whole clause; indicates the time reference of the speech event.
